data.title: Energy Transfer's Expansion Plan Sparks Investor Interest
data.description: Energy Transfer (ET) stock is currently trading below $20, which may present a buying opportunity due to its $5.5 billion plan to expand gas infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, analysts, including UBS, maintain a positive outlook with a price target of $22, bolstered by consistent dividend growth and strong demand from income-focused investors. The company's strategic investments and favorable sector sentiment make it an appealing option for generating income in the midstream energy market.

data.title: VanEck Launches First U.S. Spot Avalanche ETF With Built-In Staking Yield
data.description:
The VanEck Avalanche ETF (VAVX) officially began trading on NASDAQ on January 26, 2026, marking the first U. S. -listed spot ETF dedicated to Avalanche’s native token, AVAX. The launch represents a notable evolution in crypto ETFs, combining direct spot exposure with on-chain yield generation, an approach rarely seen in U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/vaneck-launches-first-u-s-spot-avalanche-etf-with-built-in-staking-yield/

data.title: Ripple Enters Saudi Banking System Through Strategic Jeel Partnership
data.description:
Ripple has announced a strategic partnership with Jeel, the innovation and technology subsidiary of Riyad Bank, marking a significant step toward integrating blockchain infrastructure into Saudi Arabia’s financial system. The collaboration directly supports the Kingdom’s Saudi Vision 2030 agenda, which prioritizes digital transformation, financial modernization, and economic diversification beyond oil-based revenues.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ripple-enters-saudi-banking-system-through-strategic-jeel-partnership/

data.title: Bitmine’s staked Ether holdings point to $160M in annual staking revenue
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitmine-staked-ether-holdings-annual-staking-revenue?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Nifty Gateway Announces Closure in 2026, Impacting NFT Community
data.description: Nifty Gateway, a prominent platform in the NFT sector, has revealed plans to cease operations on February 23, 2026. According to NS3.AI, this decision has sparked apprehension among artists and collectors regarding the withdrawal of assets and the future of digital artworks. Despite the impending shutdown, Nifty Gateway's contributions to the NFT ecosystem are acknowledged for enhancing accessibility and providing opportunities for artists.

data.title: Stablecoin Liquidity Breaks Lower as $7B Exits Crypto in a Single Week
data.description:
The crypto market is flashing one of its clearest liquidity warning signals of the current cycle. According to data from CryptoQuant, the total supply of ERC-20 stablecoins has dropped sharply, marking the first decline of this magnitude during the ongoing market cycle.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/stablecoin-liquidity-breaks-lower-as-7b-exits-crypto-in-a-single-week/
